title: I've Spent 10+ Years in Software Engineering. After Sickness, Burnout, and a Layoff, I'm Rebuilding My Career. Ask Me Anything
excerpt: Hi, I'm Cesar, a Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience. In 2023, I got sick and...
content_html:
Writing therapy and a new book trilogy

Hi, I'm Cesar, a Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience.

In 2023, I got sick and burned out.
In 2024, I was laid off and even rejected from FAANG.

I used the time between jobs as a mini-sabbatical to recover.
Writing became part of my therapy, and dev.to was a big part of the journey.
Hitting the Top7 and encouraging comments pushed me to keep writing.

Since then, I've been turning my lessons into posts and books.
My goal is to complete a trilogy before I retire (hopefully before I'm 60).
I already published the second one, Street-Smart Coding, and I'm working on a prequel.

This week, I'm celebrating my 7-year anniversary on dev.to.
Ask me anything about coding, burnout, or writing.
I don't have all answers, tho.
Or simply stop by to say Hi.

content_html_zh:
写作疗法和新书三部曲

大家好，我是 Cesar，一位拥有 10 多年经验的高级软件工程师。

2023年，我生病了，精疲力尽。 2024年，我被解雇，甚至被FAANG拒绝。

我利用工作间隙的时间作为一个小休假来恢复。 写作成为我治疗的一部分，而 dev.to 是整个旅程的重要组成部分。 进入前七名和鼓舞人心的评论促使我继续写作。

从那时起，我一直把我的课程变成帖子和书籍。 我的目标是在退休前完成三部曲（希望在 60 岁之前）。 我已经出版了第二本《Street-Smart Coding》，并且正在制作前传。

本周，我将庆祝我加入 dev.to 七周年纪念日。 向我询问有关编码、倦怠或写作的任何问题。 我没有所有的答案。 或者只是停下来打个招呼。
